title: Fix public homepage audit findings
description: Apply the approved static-site fixes: native mobile navigation, complete English browser metadata and visible labels, static Tailwind CSS plus removal of AOS, and real mailto links.
acceptance_criteria: Mobile section navigation works; English state updates browser metadata and audited labels; Tailwind CDN and AOS are removed; all mail actions are mailto links; browser checks pass.
close_reason: Completed static homepage audit fixes and browser verification

title: Stabiliser le CV premium ciblé en deux pages suisses
description: Pour 13 ans d'expérience et des postes senior suisses, deux pages A4 sont le format cible. Conserver l'intégralité des expériences pertinentes sans compression artificielle ; améliorer la hiérarchie, l'équilibre des deux pages et la cohérence avec ATS/LM/pitch.
acceptance_criteria: CV premium ciblé : 2 pages A4 intentionnelles, lisibles et équilibrées ; expériences pertinentes conservées ; contrôle PDF et navigateur
notes: Remplace l'hypothèse erronée d'une page. La LM et l'ATS restent à une page.

title: Document Beads repo selection rule
description: When work targets public or private career repos, Beads tracking should live in the target repo; if a task spans both public and private repos, track it in the public repo.
close_reason: Documented Beads routing rule in public and private repo instructions; cross-repo policy tracked in public repo.

title: Fix English CV links
description: English language mode currently points download and online-view actions at French CV assets. Fix the links to target English resume assets when English is selected.
close_reason: Fixed English-mode CV links: hide French-only PDF download and route online view to English portfolio state.

title: Generate market-aware pitch expectations
description: Derive tailored pitch expectations from offer country, salary range, contract and role level rather than generic profile copy or per-offer manual text.
acceptance_criteria: Swiss and UN pitches derive role and package expectations automatically from offer frontmatter
close_reason: Pitch expectations now derive from offer metadata.

title: Clean cover-letter header metadata
description: Remove duplicate generic recipient/greeting and redundant foreign-residence country labels from the shared cover-letter renderer; regenerate the Secheron bundle.
acceptance_criteria: One greeting, no generic recipient block without a named recipient, country shown once in contact metadata
close_reason: Shared header and contact metadata corrected; Secheron bundle regenerated.

title: Persist country-language document conventions
description: Add a reusable convention registry in Borg and mirror the lookup-before-research rule into the public CV factory process.
acceptance_criteria: Country/language/document lookup policy exists in vault and factory process; researched conventions are reused and missing pairs trigger research
close_reason: Convention registry added to Borg and lookup-first policy mirrored in the CV factory process.

title: Audit de cohérence visuelle CV et lettre
description: Vérifier la cohérence design CV/lettre, le rendu généré et la faisabilité du flux de candidature. Ne pas soumettre de candidature sans offre et validation finale.
acceptance_criteria: Contrôle visuel avec constats et correctifs priorisés
notes: Audit complete: premium CV is two pages; ATS, LM and pitch are one page. Browser UI launch was unavailable without X server; local PDF rendering supplied the page-count evidence. Premium one-page redesign remains required before submission.
close_reason: Audit design terminé; refonte premium tracée dans l'issue de suivi.

title: Audit end-to-end copywriting bilingue des lettres
description: Auditer les modèles et le rendu de lettres FR/EN : répétitions, structure, alignement à la langue de l'annonce et priorisation des langues pour la Suisse. Ne pas écrire de données d'entreprise dans le dépôt public.
acceptance_criteria: Diagnostic sourcé, recommandations minimales et critères de qualité de sortie
notes: Audit complete and shared renderer fixed: no duplicate letter paragraphs, posting language shown first, salary omitted unless explicitly requested. Secheron bundle regenerated for verification; final application remains blocked by premium CV two-page design and human fit review.
close_reason: Audit copywriting terminé et correctifs partagés appliqués.
